name: io.github.YS-projectcalc/agent-cold-email
description: Agent-native cold-email infrastructure: domains, mailboxes, warmup, sequences, replies via 17 tools

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_COLD_EMAIL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token from POST /signup (free, no card) — or run `npx agent-cold-email demo` first. Optional at startup: without it, `initialize`/`tools/list` still work (unauthenticated introspection), but every `tools/call` fails until a key is set.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from POST /signup (free, no card) — or run `npx agent-cold-email demo` first
